title: Add benchmark summary runner
description: Add a unified runner that executes Python and Rust benchmarks and prints a summary table for latency.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Benchmark summary checks are in tools/check_benchmarks.py, which runs Python/Rust index and discovery benchmarks and parses JSON output.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Runner prints consolidated results for both implementations.
